subject: PennyAlpha Pre-Market — 2026-05-04
text:
Pre-Market Summary — 2026-05-04

Candidates screened: 6 | Passed filters: 2

TICKER | PM Move% | Direction | Catalyst | SEC Confirmed
--------------------------------------------------------------
XRX    | +17.1%   | UP        | Q1 2026 earnings beat (EPS $0.43 vs $0.27 est); AI ITaaS pivot; guidance reaffirmed | Yes (8-K/earnings 2026-04-30)
BB     | +12.7%   | UP        | Q4 FY2026 beat (8th consecutive profit); Nvidia partnership expanded | Yes (Q4 earnings)

Screened out: EBAY (+11.8%, too expensive); CELC (+17.4%, $147 too expensive); LNAI (+13.4%, $0.36 below $0.50 floor); CABA (dilution — $150M equity offering priced today, flagged as risk-off).

Notes: XRX scores 4/5 — confirmed 8-K, strong volume ($56M+ prev day), technical breakout from $1.22 base, no dilution. BB scores 3/5 — confirmed earnings, $90M+ volume, above 52-wk high, but less catalytic urgency today.

Brad reads this on his phone — keep it short.
